data.title: Google Drive Integration
data.description:
As a user, I want to connect Google Drive so DSO can read project documents, design assets, and shared files stored there — mirroring the Confluence integration planned for knowledge-base access.

## Motivation
Peer to the planned Confluence integration (see related epic). Many teams store design docs, meeting notes, and reference materials in Google Drive rather than Confluence. Supporting both gives DSO broad coverage of where teams actually keep their knowledge.
